title: Unlock 39 AI-Detected Trading Patterns: Tickeron’s Pattern Search Engine (PSE) Empowers Traders with Precision and Ease
author: tickeron_community
selftext: **New York, NY – September 8, 2025** – Tickeron, a leader in AI-driven financial tools, today announced the launch of its advanced [**Pattern Search Engine (PSE)**](https://tickeron.com/stock-pattern-screener/), a revolutionary platform that scans 39 distinct trading patterns across stocks, penny stocks, ETFs, crypto, and forex. Designed for traders seeking to harness the psychology of market movements, PSE leverages artificial intelligence to identify hidden opportunities, providing actionable insights on entry and exit points with unprecedented accuracy. New users can try PSE for free for 14 days, followed by a subscription of just $30 per month.
